definition: for absolute or gauge pressure measuring devices, square root of: nonlinearity^2 + (maximum ambient temperature error per 28 °C change)^2, expressed as percentage of span

definition_ml.en: for absolute or gauge pressure measuring devices, square root of: nonlinearity^2 + (maximum ambient temperature error per 28 °C change)^2, expressed as percentage of span
definition_ml.fr: pour des appareils de mesure de pression absolue ou relative, racine carrée de: non-linéarité^2 + (erreur maximale de température ambiante par changement de 28 °C)^2, exprimée en pourcentage de l’intervalle de mesure
definition_ml.de: bei Absolut- oder Überdruckmessgeräten, Quadratwurzel aus: Nichtlinearität^2 + (maximaler Umgebungstemperaturfehler pro Änderung um 28 °C)^2, in relativen Einheiten der Spanne

note: 28 °C temperature change is derived from 50°F temperature change

note_ml.en: 28 °C temperature change is derived from 50°F temperature change
note_ml.de: Eine Temperaturänderung von 28 °C wird von einer Temperaturänderung von 50°F abgeleitet

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: for absolute or gauge pressure measuring devices, square root of: nonlinearity^2 + (maximum ambient temperature error per 28 °C change)^2, expressed as percentage of span
raw_properties.MDC_P008.en: 28 °C temperature change is derived from 50°F temperature change
